task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the NOSH ChartingSystem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login with the 'admin' credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the practice settings or operating hours configuration page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings page, modal, or form displaying 'Hillside Family Medicine' practice information and a schedule of operating hours is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that operating hours for other days remain unchanged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The closing times for other days (e.g., Monday) are visible and remain set to their original values (17:00 or 5:00 PM).

task_completion.description: Verify that Friday's opening time remains unchanged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The opening time input field for Friday shows '08:00' or '8:00 AM'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Friday's closing time is updated to 1:00 PM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The closing time input field or dropdown for Friday is explicitly set to '13:00' or '1:00 PM'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the updated operating hours.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Save' or 'Update' button, followed by a success notification (e.g., 'Saved', 'Success'), or the settings page reflects the saved changes without unsaved indicators.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NOSH web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the web browser and NOSH GUI. There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL commands, curl requests, or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the changes were made in the actual NOSH ChartingSystem.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual NOSH ChartingSystem application in a browser, not a text editor, mock HTML file, or database viewer.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't use browser developer tools to fake the visual state.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open and being used to alter the DOM text to appear correct.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target field is the Friday closing time, which must be updated from its initial value of 17:00 (5:00 PM) to 13:00 (1:00 PM). Control fields that must remain unchanged include the Friday opening time (must remain 08:00 or 8:00 AM) and the Monday closing time (must remain 17:00 or 5:00 PM).
